signals.headline: Bank of Korea Holds Benchmark Interest Rate at 2
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Benchmark Interest Rate at 2.5% for 7th Consecutive Month | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board unanimously decided on April 10, 2026, to maintain its benchmark rate at 2.5%, citing upside inflation risks from surging oil prices amid Middle East conflict and CPI slightly above the 2% target, with growth expected below 2% due to a weakened won at
